web_results.description: Propose resolutionThis market will resolve according to the next date (ET) the US initiates a drone, missile, or air strike on Iranian soil or any official Iranian embassy or consulate between market creation and February 28, 2026, (ET).

web_results.title: 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations - Wikipedia
web_results.description: A third round of talking was scheduled for 26 February on nuclear issues in Switzerland. In the midst of this round of negotiations, it was reported that the sides were far from reaching a deal. Anticipating attacks on its oil terminals ahead of third round Iranian regime rushed loading unto its tanker fleet 20 billion oil barrel in 6 day time.

web_results.title: Ten predictions for the potential US strikes on Iran - Atlantic Council
web_results.description: There are more likely and less likely possibilities for what will happen if US President Donald Trump decides to launch an attack on Iran.

web_results.title: The U.S. and Iran Can Still Avoid a War | International Crisis Group
web_results.description: Just as the White House risks painting itself into a corner with its expensive, high-profile build-up and burgeoning demands, it is pushing Tehran into a corner where Iranian officials may see little to lose in answering any U.S. attack with a painful blow that would dim the U.S. aura of invincibility and cost Trump politically. Momentum appears to favour confrontation. Still, the diplomatic path is not yet entirely blocked, with a third and potentially decisive round of talks slated for 26 February.

news_results.title: Iran Update, February 23, 2026 | ISW
news_results.description: A senior US official told Axios on Feb. 22 that the US and Iran may discuss an interim deal during negotiations in Geneva on February 26.

news_results.title: US-Iran talks end with no deal but potential signs of progress | Reuters
news_results.description: The United States and Iran made progress in talks over Tehran's nuclear program on Thursday, mediator Oman said, but hours of negotiation ended with no sign of a breakthrough that could avert potential U.S. strikes amid a massive military buildup.

news_results.title: A timeline of tensions over Iran's nuclear program as talks with U.S. approach | PBS News
news_results.description: Iran and the United States are due to hold new talks in Geneva on Thursday over Tehran's nuclear program.
